title: Blue's Self-Sacrifice Attempt
summary: Blue decides that his life should be the one to end, not his father's, and attacks the monster to protect him and his friend.

title: Formation of the Fairy Contract
summary: Lyriel offers to save everyone in exchange for Blue's promise to take her to the Guardian of the Tree of Life in nine years.

title: Truth About Mother's Oath
summary: Rurik explains the life-oath that binds Elaria's fate to his choice to survive and raise their children.
